headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on U.S. Bancorp, Lowers Price Target to $58
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $65 to $58.
